feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: currency in comp information portlets
entry.content:
Hi Team 

We have a requirement , where for a particular country ( Turkey) the Base pay  and other pay components are paid both in local currency and Euros.  For some employee the base pay  in Euro and other pay components are in Local currency, while for other employees the base pay in local currency and other pay components are in Euros. The Requirements is that , the compensation portlets should be displayed based on the base currency and even if the other pay components is not is as same as base currency.

For example if an employee as Base pay  in Euro and other components in Local currency, even the local currency should be displayed in Euros ( After exchange rates) , similarly if an employee as Base pay  in Local currency  and other components in Euro , even the local currency should be displayed in local currency ( After exchange rates) .

 

Just want to is it feasible to display in comp info portlets based on base pay currency

 

Regards

Kamesh Rangarajan

entry.title: Reporting on completed workflows
entry.content:
Hi,
We have set up Custom MDF's where there are the following participants of a workflow:
Initiator: The manager initiates a workflow when adding the MDF to his employee.
Approver: This goes to a seperate approver
Employee: The employee is the final step. He/she checks the workflow and approves if all is OK.

That all works as expected of course, but when these workflows are completed, we have a need of picking them up and archiving them. Normally I would just read the data of the MDF from Odata API on custom MDF object of user. But I also need to fetch information about the approvers in the workflow, and at what date they signed/approved the workflow.

I was hoping to be able to do this with the latest release of 1H 2025, but cant seem to figure out how to fetch the participants, and date of approvals.

With only one initiator and one final approver, I can store the user and date in the MDF itself, as the creation of the MDF is triggering a save (so I can populate hidden fields) and the final accept of the workflow is also triggering a save (so I can populate final details). But with an approver in the middle, not changing anything (only approving or sending back), there is no save action, so no way to pick up the user and date of this "middle" approver. Hence the need to access this from API after workflow is completed.

Any tips on this would be great!

See image for reference. This is what I can see when browsing completed workflows from the "Workflow Requests Page". I want to fetch Initiator, Approver and Employee (final approver) as shown here, with userID/name and date of approval.

entry.title: Picklist field error_invalid number format
entry.content:
Hi, 

Our custom portlet UI has fields Country and Picklist, both were string, but we have changed them to Picklist in order to maintain cascading picklists for them. So, I have 2 issues:

1. The State field still doesn't show dropdown

2. If I try to enter a value manually, I get following error.

Has anyone seen this error? any tips? I have even tried to refresh these fields on the UI, no luck.

Thanks & regards/ Mithila Pethe

entry.title: SAP SF EC WF Email Notifications
entry.content:
Hi, 

An initiator applied for a leave. That leave request should go to the approver as an email notification saying, 'You have received a workflow request.' Once the approver approves the workflow, a notification should be sent back to the initiator that the leave is approved. So, if we want to define who should receive which notification and when — how can we do that? Here, how does the workflow email notification go to the approver, and how does the email notification about the approved workflow request go to the initiator?

entry.title: SAP HCM t-code to SAP SuccessFactors transaction counterpart
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Is t-code IT0743 - Discipline in SAP HCM has a counterpart or equivalent with SAP SuccessFactors?

Also, is this t-code only applicable and only used within Russia? 

Thank you very much!

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Edit Workflow Initiators & Approvers
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for a way to change the initiators and approvers of actions, such as Add New Employee, Termination, etc. I need those approvers to be of different roles and for them to be able to replace each other. Could you kindly advise on the way to do that?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: Can a report be pulled from SuccessFactors for Pending Workflow Requests?
entry.content:
I have been asked by the HR Manager if a report can be ran from SuccessFactors of all Pending Workflow Requests.

Some KBA's that I have read suggest that this can't be done. Is there a way to get this information from SF?

Thanks

entry.title: Prevent approval for working time account
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have configured separate time type for working time account and over time type. We have a requirement, only overtime type  should trigger workflow approval but not working time account time type.  is there a way to prevent working time account time type for workflow approval. I can utilise single record approval for over time type but overtime type has to be replicated to payroll for processing. is there a way to prevent working time account for approval and include only overtime type for approval and further replication to ECP. 

Thanks

Shilpa

entry.title: Standard Story report not picking all employees despite no filter on the query ?
entry.content:
HI @ALL 

We have been encountering issues with exported standard reports - where different standard reports are skipping employees in the output. 

We have checked on main query itself and there are no filters -  & we try to regenerate same query from scratch users are reflecting ? 

Such inconsistent behavior is making our client doubt the stability of story report and are asking for reconciliation - reconciliation of something which itself should be used for the same?

Eventually , on comparing with table report - discrepancy still reflect. 

Anyone encountered something similar or troubleshooted such case ?

entry.title: SAP SF EC Associations
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP SF EC, after creating an association in the child object, why do we still need to configure field criteria? When we create an association, it should filter the values in the child object based on the value selected in the parent object, right? Then why do we need to configure field criteria again in Manage Business Configuration (MBC)?

entry.title: Canvas - Calendar
entry.content:
Hi all, 

After the release, I noticed that the Canvas calendar was adjusted. This change wasn't mentioned in the release notes, correct? The calendar now covers the other date range. 

Kind regards

Mirjam

entry.title: How to set up multiple cost centres split for an employee in EC?
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone please guide me on the best practice for setting up multiple cost centres split for an employee in EC and integration into ECP?

Would it be better to look into capturing the multiple cost centre split in EC profile vs setting up concurrent employment for an employee?

Thanks,
AD

entry.title: Retrieve historical compensation items from Employee Central to complete Compensation module workshe
entry.content:
Hello dear,

I'd like to share with you a precise expression of need and my difficulties to do it :

(1) The objective is twofold:
- recover as much compensation and job information as possible from Employee Central to feed the worksheet design of a compensation campaign, person by person, for each year,
- to limit the use of LookUp tables as much as possible, unless no other solution can be found.

(2) For most “campaign year” information, it's simple
- I'll take the preparation of the 2025 compensation campaign as an example
- simply indicate in the worksheet design Employee Central field
- the value for the current year will be retrieved and displayed.
- This works very well for the Base Salary 2025 or the team on the campaign date, for example.

(3) However, this does not work as easily for previous years' compensation data for Base Salary and Bonus N-1, N-2 as described below.

Someone told us that one possible solution was to prepare the data via Integration Center and feed it into the worksheet.

I started by building an MDF object with 5 basic pieces of information:
- User
- Base salary N-1
- Base salary N-2
- Bonus N-1
- Bonus N-2

I want to collect information from Employee Central via an integration to complete the MDF Object.

But when I try to set up an Inbound Integration I face some difficulties such as :
* collecting salary information for two consecutive years in the same integration, how can I retrieve them (ie Base Salary N-1 and Base Salary N-2)?
* how to collect this information also for Non Recurring Pay Components, i.e. the elements that make up the Spot Bonus, and sum them into a single total bonus per person per year (Total Bonus = Incentive + Profit Sharing + Cash Bonus + Variable Bonus, etc.)?

Would you have the possibility to give me some helpful advices on how to do it ?
This type of configuration must have been frequently implemented by many SF users, perhaps a tutorial already exists?

entry.title: Incorrect number generated despite a business rule
entry.content: Kindly ignore.

entry.title: send an email ( with an attchment) to selected employees on hire date anniversay
entry.content:
Hi experts

Any tips would be appreciated. My client wants to be able to send an email (with an attachment) to selected employees on the anniversary of their hire date. My initial thoughts are to:

- create template in Manage Document template 

- create an integration which filters for the impacted employee type to be dropped onto an SFTP server

- schedule the integration to run at the 12 month anniversary of impacted employee

Has anyone else attempted such a requirement/ something similar. I do not have SFTP skills so would be interested in what is necessary to facilitate such a requirement

Any other smarter options to achieve the above requirement

entry.title: How to capture a Report for all the changes made to Work Order for Contingent Workers. SAP SF
entry.content:
Hello All-

My customer has asked me to generate a report for all the changes made in Work Order portlet for Contingent Workers. I have tried the below-

1- Uploaded the story report- SF_EMP_Contingent_Worker_Analysis_v2.0, But the problem is this report doesn't show all the minute changes made in work order by whom.  SF_EMP_Contingent_Worker_Analysis_v2.0.pdf

2- Tried Creating a Story Report with Employee details >> Job Info>> work order as objects , But even this report doesnt show the changes made.

3- Tried to generate a audit report >> Went to Create Configuration Data Report>> MDF Configuration Data > but no luck

4- Also Tried generating a table report with Person and employment audit as base object but CWK fields are not see,

 

Please tell me as how can i generate this report capturing all changes made in Work order.

entry.title: Concurrent Employment in Recruiting
entry.content: Since concurrent employments aren't supported in Recruiting solution, How are you currently managing internal career site access for employees with concurrent employment? Because, currently, when there is an application submitted through one of the employments, the employee loses access to the career site.

entry.title: Practices of customizing the events on Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi, experts,

Our customers need to add some events to meet the HR actions in Japan.

But refer to this document, it seems like the events cannot be customized.

Events in Employee Central | SAP Help Portal

Does anyone have some practices for this?

Flora.W

entry.title: Location Entry Date
entry.content:
🚨 The Case of the Missing Location Entry Dates! 🚨

We recently migrated data for around 5,000 employees from another HR system into SAP SuccessFactors. Everything seemed smooth at first…
Until we discovered something strange:
💡 The "Location Entry Date" field was missing from their Job Info records!

We thought it would be a quick fix — just go in, add the missing date, and save.
But nope! ❌ The system either rejected the change or didn’t reflect it at all.

So we reached out to our SAP consultant, and this was the response:

"You can’t add a Location Entry Date for a future date. It only updates when an employee is hired or when they actually move to a new location."

Fair enough, but we’re now stuck with thousands of employees without this key field populated.

🧠 Has anyone faced this before? How did you fix it?

entry.title: offcycle event batch not working
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

We have created an offcycle event batch with the associated scenario as "Trigger an Off Cycle Event Batch" with the below condition

If the event reason = Contract extended
and
Event date = Today
Then
Set Custom Field = Add ()
First = Custom Field
Second = 1

I have also created off cycle event group where i have added my test user

When i run the off cycle event batch job , the job is successful however the record is not getting picked up and data is not get getting populated in the custom field.

When i checked the traces of the rule there is no data picked up in the trace , looks like my rule is not getting picked up by offcycle event batch . Can you please let me know what can be the cause of this issue .

Please note i have added and event reason contract extended for today in the user profile.
